overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic castle interior, ascending stone staircases past magical artifacts and animated paintings, encountering wizard students, and entering a grand sunlit lecture hall with tiered seating and stained glass windows.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a stone staircase within a gothic castle. The camera passes a display case containing a skeleton specimen and approaches a magical painting that depicts a moving scene of a figure in a dark forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper staircase landing with wooden ceiling beams

entered.detail: exposed dark wooden beams supporting the high ceiling
stone archway leading to the next room

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent to the upper levels, the camera reaches a landing with exposed wooden ceiling beams. A student in wizard robes stands at the top of the stairs, and the stone walls give way to an arched doorway leading forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with study area transitioning to wood-paneled hallway

moving from stone corridor into wood-paneled hallway with ornate door

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a stone corridor where a student sits reading beside a magical fire, passing a large stone statue and book stacks. The environment transitions to a wood-paneled hallway with ornate doors and wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand lecture hall with tiered seating and stained glass windows

camera pans around to survey the grand hall and tiered wooden seating

tall gothic windows with colorful heraldic designs and crests
large circular iron chandelier with multiple lit candles hanging from the ceiling
ornate wooden railing on upper level with carved details
lectern or desk at the center of the hall on a raised platform

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a magnificent sunlit hall with dramatic golden light streaming through tall stained glass windows. The space features tiered wooden seating, a grand chandelier, and ornate wood paneling. The camera pans around to reveal the full scope of the lecture hall or courtroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dim, mysterious corridors of a gothic castle into a grand, sun-drenched lecture hall. It begins with an ascent up a stone staircase, passing a skeleton specimen and a magical painting of a dark forest. As the camera reaches a landing with exposed wooden beams, it passes a robed student and moves through an arched doorway into a stone corridor filled with book stacks and a magical fire. The environment then shifts from cold stone to a warm, wood-paneled hallway with ornate doors and wall sconces before finally opening into a magnificent hall. Dramatic golden light streams through tall stained glass windows, illuminating tiered wooden seating and a grand chandelier as the camera pans to reveal the full scope of the room.
